## PluginExternalBundleOptions.externalsPresetDefinitions property

Definitions for custom externals presets enabled by `externalsPresets`<!-- -->.

Use this to add business-specific presets such as `lynxUi`<!-- -->, or to extend a built-in preset through `extends`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
externalsPresetDefinitions?: ExternalsPresetDefinitions;
```
